sentences.target: Ich bekomme morgen die Rolle im Theater.
sentences.reading: /ɪç bəˈkɔmə ˈmɔʁɡən diː ˈʁɔlə ɪm teˈaːtɐ/

translations.de: Ich bekomme morgen die Rolle im Theater.
translations.ipa: /ɪç bəˈkɔmə ˈmɔʁɡən diː ˈʁɔlə ɪm teˈaːtɐ/
translations.en: I'm getting the role at the theater tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana me dan el papel en el teatro.
translations.fr: Demain, j'obtiens le rôle au théâtre.
translations.it: Domani avrò la parte a teatro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天会在剧院拿到这个角色。
translations.yue: 我聽日會喺劇院攞到個角色。
translations.ru: Завтра я получу роль в театре.
translations.pt: Amanhã vou conseguir o papel no teatro.
translations.he: מחר אני מקבלת את התפקיד בתיאטרון.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ nhận vai diễn ở nhà hát.
translations.ar: غدًا سأحصل على الدور في المسرح.
translations.nl: Morgen krijg ik de rol in het theater.
translations.uk: Завтра я отримаю роль у театрі.
translations.hu: Holnap megkapom a szerepet a színházban.
translations.hi: कल मुझे थिएटर में भूमिका मिलेगी.
translations.el: Αύριο θα πάρω τον ρόλο στο θέατρο.
translations.nb: I morgen får jeg rollen på teateret.
translations.id: Besok aku dapat peran di teater.
translations.sv: Imorgon får jag rollen på teatern.
translations.da: I morgen får jeg rollen på teatret.
translations.ja: 明日、劇場で役をもらいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive, taking the direct object 'die Rolle' and a locative PP 'im Theater'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates the time of the event.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner for 'Rolle' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; here denotes a theatrical role; accusative singular as the direct object of 'bekomme'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') governing dative; introduces the locative phrase.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im', dative singular; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Die Rolle ist schon wieder leer.

translations.de: Die Rolle ist schon wieder leer.
translations.es: El rollo de papel higiénico está otra vez vacío.
translations.fr: Le rouleau de papier toilette est encore vide.
translations.it: Il rotolo di carta igienica è di nuovo finito.
translations.pt: O rolo de papel higiênico está vazio de novo.
translations.he: הגליל של נייר הטואלט שוב ריק.
translations.vi: Cuộn giấy vệ sinh lại hết rồi.
translations.ar: لفة ورق التواليت فارغة مرة أخرى.
translations.hi: टॉयलेट पेपर का रोल फिर खाली है.
translations.pl: Rolka papieru toaletowego znowu jest pusta.
translations.el: Το ρολό χαρτιού υγείας είναι πάλι άδειο.
translations.ro: Rola de hârtie igienică e din nou goală.
translations.cs: Rolka toaletního papíru je zase prázdná.
translations.ja: トイレットペーパーがまたなくなった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner for the subject 'Rolle'.
Common noun, feminine; here refers to a physical roll/spool (e.g., paper/tape); nominative singular as the subject.
Auxiliary verb (copula), 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb indicating that the state holds earlier than expected.
Adverb indicating repetition; modifies the predicate.
Adjective used predicatively; predicate complement describing the subject’s state.

sentences.target: Ich finde keine Rolle Klebeband zu Hause.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfɪndə ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈʁɔlə ˈkleːbəˌbant tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/

translations.de: Ich finde keine Rolle Klebeband zu Hause.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfɪndə ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈʁɔlə ˈkleːbəˌbant tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/
translations.en: I can't find a roll of tape at home.
translations.es: No encuentro un rollo de cinta adhesiva en casa.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas de rouleau de scotch à la maison.
translations.it: A casa non trovo un rotolo di nastro adesivo.
translations.ko: 집에서 테이프 한 롤을 못 찾겠어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在家找不到一卷胶带。
translations.yue: 我喺屋企揾唔到一卷膠紙。
translations.ru: Дома не могу найти рулон клейкой ленты.
translations.pt: Não encontro um rolo de fita adesiva em casa.
translations.he: אני לא מוצאת גליל סרט דביק בבית.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy một cuộn băng keo ở nhà.
translations.ar: لا أجد لفة شريط لاصق في البيت.
translations.nl: Thuis kan ik geen rol plakband vinden.
translations.uk: Я не можу знайти вдома рулон клейкої стрічки.
translations.hu: Otthon nem találok egy tekercs ragasztószalagot.
translations.hi: घर पर मुझे टेप का रोल नहीं मिल रहा है.
translations.pl: W domu nie mogę znaleźć rolki taśmy klejącej.
translations.el: Στο σπίτι δεν μπορώ να βρω ένα ρολό αυτοκόλλητης ταινίας.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke en teiprull hjemme.
translations.id: Saya tidak menemukan gulungan lakban di rumah.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta en rulle tejp hemma.
translations.ro: Nu găsesc o rolă de bandă adezivă acasă.
translations.cs: Doma nemůžu najít roli lepicí pásky.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde en rulle tape derhjemme.
translations.ja: 家でテープのロールが見つからない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Negative determiner, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Rolle' to express negation.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP; here a unit/container (a roll) of something; accusative singular.
Compound common noun; specifies the content/material of the roll in a noun–noun construction ('Rolle Klebeband').
Preposition used in the fixed expression 'zu Hause'; forms an adverbial PP indicating location.
Common noun (archaic dative form) in the fixed expression 'zu Hause'; the whole PP functions as a locative adverbial ('at home').

sentences.target: Das spielt für mich keine Rolle.

translations.de: Das spielt für mich keine Rolle.
translations.pt: Isso não faz diferença para mim.
translations.vi: Điều đó không quan trọng với tôi.
translations.pl: To nie ma dla mnie znaczenia.
translations.nb: Det spiller ingen rolle γia meg.
translations.sv: Det spelar ingen roll för mig.
translations.da: Det er lige meget for mig.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject; refers to a previously mentioned situation or fact.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; used in the idiom 'keine Rolle spielen' meaning 'to not matter'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a benefactive/affected participant ('mich').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.
Negative determiner, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Rolle'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'spielt' in the fixed expression 'keine Rolle spielen' meaning 'to be of no importance'.
